actor_decision.primary_mechanism: Persistent qualitative LLM actors (swm/world_model_v2/qualitative_actor.py). One LLM call inhabits a persistent per-branch hidden-state hypothesis and CHOOSES one action; probabilities arise only afterward by counting choices across branches.

steps: 909-913: >1 posterior world => multi_particle_bridge_is_numeric (pooled Phase-3->4 bridge stays numeric, recorded)

decision_prompt_contents_today.output_schema: JSON: decision{act_or_wait, chosen_action, target, timing, revisit{when,condition}, observability, intended_effect, linked_actions}, decision_summary, novel_action_proposal, alternatives_considered, situation_interpretation, anticipated_reactions, actor_state_update -- NO numbers anywhere (parse drops+counts numerics via _texts_only 91-113)

observation_supply_chain.actor_view: phase4_policy.py:385-505 ActorViewBuilder.build: observed_events = ALL information.visible_to(actor_id, at=now) rows (416-430, NO cap) + explicitly-passed observed_events filtered by _event_visible (432-436, 532-535), sorted by time (484). beliefs include public process quantities (403-408). memory field -> remembered_events (477-485). latent_state keys prefixed phase4_policy_ -> policy_state (479-481); QUAL_STATE_KEY deliberately NOT prefixed so it never leaks into numeric/persona views (qualitative_actor.py:60-63)
observation_supply_chain.information_ledger: information.py:41-80 InformationLedger: publish/expose/visible_to (58-69: only items the actor was EXPOSED to by ts); Exposure.salience decays (decay 75-80, half-life 10d) but salience is NOT consulted at view-build or prompt time
observation_supply_chain.generated_mode_flow: generated_world.py: k_emit_semantic_event (308-417, exact_content[:1200], verified observability only) -> route_semantic_event (803-870, per-recipient channel_delivery_ts) -> GeneratedObservationDeliveryOperator (1047-1116: publish item WITHOUT expose; record_available_observation temporal_runtime.py:317-328; schedule_attention 331-351) -> GeneratedAttentionOperator (1119-1193: collect_attention_bundle temporal_runtime.py:354-389 takes ALL available items, exposes to ledger HERE, one bundle -> one trigger -> one ctrl_invoke_actor) -> GeneratedActorInvocationOperator (situation string from bundle). observation.py (Observation/ObservationModel, 133 lines) is the quantitative measurement layer (polling/detection likelihoods) -- NOT on the qualitative actor path

persistent_private_state.container: entity.latent_state['qualitative_actor_state'] (QUAL_STATE_KEY qualitative_actor.py:63) on EACH branch world; load/store 185-205
persistent_private_state.schema: QualitativeActorState 117-183: 14 qualitative sections (STATE_SECTIONS 71-76); important_memories capped 12 (169), lists capped 16, revision_log capped 24 with provenance (179-181); identity_and_role not updatable (UPDATABLE_SECTIONS 79)
persistent_private_state.update_path: _post_execute 1114-1157 (after execute, same StateDelta): apply qd.actor_state_update + auto-memory 'I chose to <action>'; anticipated_reactions -> entity.expected_reactions (subjective, 1142-1155); stateless mode skips with reason code 1126-1128
persistent_private_state.cross_session: NOT persisted across sessions. Phase 8 persists only typed registry variables (e.g. engagement_propensity) + event log + episodic memory exposure (phase8_pipeline.py:129-287, 356-378); qualitative state is re-hypothesized per run

per_actor_particle_differentiation.hypothesizer: QualitativeParticleHypothesizer qualitative_actor.py:297-404: K=3 hypotheses (n_hypotheses QualitativeConfig:704) generated ONCE per (actor_id, round(observed_time), hash(structural_frame)) (316); LLM prompt _HYPOTHESIZE_PROMPT 209-230 over view evidence (stances/commitments/last 10 observed events/relationships[:8]/goals, max 2400 chars 364-381); fallback template set 233-294; truncation salvage _balanced_objects 407-435
per_actor_particle_differentiation.assignment: state_for_branch 347-362: hypothesis index = _branch_index(world) % K (438-443, digits in branch_id); each branch's state then evolves independently (branch worlds are independent deep copies -- load_actor_state docstring 185-187)
per_actor_particle_differentiation.no_decision_caching: QualitativeDecisionEngine docstring 723-727: no cross-branch caching of decisions; only the hypothesis SET is shared. ScopedActorCache (llm_call_cache.py:157-203) shares byte-identical calls ACROSS STRUCTURAL MODELS at the same particle index (CRN), keyed (particle_scope, backend fingerprint, prompt bytes, occurrence#)
per_actor_particle_differentiation.structural_frame: QualitativeConfig.structural_frame (713-715) conditions hypothesis generation only, labeled conjecture (322-332, fallback 286-293); today set ONLY on the individual-reaction ensemble route (individual_reaction.py:173-174 from structural_runtime.py:829-836); full-plan ensemble models differ via their own plans, not via this field

llm_call_and_failure_handling.engine_decide: QualitativeDecisionEngine.decide 743-773: budget gate (max_llm_calls default 240, env SWM_ACTOR_LLM_BUDGET, 700-707); primary backend 1+retries attempts (retries=1, 708), then each fallback family once (752-772); serving family recorded in raw_source

llm_call_and_failure_handling.terminal_fallback: runtime.decide 947-961: numeric super().decide, marked decision_source=numeric_fallback, excluded_from_qualitative_aggregation:True; aggregation excludes fallbacks from the qualitative distribution (1370-1377); budget exhaustion at operator level => temporal truncation, no decision at all (phase4_execution.py:663-682, generated_world.py:1232-1242)
llm_call_and_failure_handling.revision: one obstacle-revision round on perceived infeasibility (965-976); actual infeasibility at execute => attempted_but_blocked delta (phase4_execution.py:104-122)

actor_decision.one_action_out: runtime.decide returns (selected TypedAction, degenerate ActionPosterior {selected:1.0}, DecisionTrace); execute() (phase4_execution.py:99-169) makes it an ATTEMPT (action_attempt_initiated 137-140), routes consequences through CausalActionCompiler/kernel ops in generated mode (197-219+), _post_execute persists state; distribution assembled later by aggregate_actor_decisions (1327-1400: weighted branch-selection counts -> ActionClusterer cluster-2.0 1182-1285 -> ActorPolicyCalibrator external calibration or 'unvalidated' 1288-1324); attached to results by materialize.attach_actor_decision_distributions (353-399)

adjacent_numeric_arms.llm_actor.py: persona_blended_numeric_policy (arm B, 835 lines): LLM RATES all options (appraisals 0..1), log-pool blend with numeric anchor (PersonaCalibration 572-615, LLMActorPolicyModel 618-684), prompt-hash cognition cache (PersonaEngine 425-534), llm_probability_minting:True; memory under latent_state['phase4_policy_persona_memory'] (72); NOT the qualitative path
adjacent_numeric_arms.actor_cognition.py: Phase 2C universal interpretation boundary (312 lines): typed numeric Interpretation (11 dims + intent, 42-68), interpret() one-call reading (108-128), FITTED ActionPolicy logistic (141-178), ACTION_PACKS typed vocab (182-192), hidden latents attention/responsiveness/obligation_sensitivity (220-244) + attention_transition mean-reversion (257-267), entity extension fields attention/workload_pressure/last_observation_ts (248-253). Used by messaging evals; ActorView.workload/attention read these fields (phase4_policy.py:496). This is the ONLY existing 'interpretation/attention' cognition code and it is numeric -- kept OUT of the qualitative mind by design

actor_decision.actor_selection: actor_selection.py: tiers 1/2/3 from compiled-plan causal structure (RelevantActorSelector.select 59-154: reaction_is_the_question, decision_right holders, scheduled decision events, stances+capability, pathway principals, resource control, persuasive access); dynamic promotion at event time 157-185 (requires live causal signal, recorded on world.uncertainty_meta); heuristic fallback 189-195; reaction-question regexes 23-36 used by public routing

insertion_points.why: PRIMARY SEAM. Between view build (933) / action+menu build (935-936) / state load (937-943) and engine.decide (946). All three invocation seams (fixed-v1 operator, generated ctrl_invoke_actor, individual-reaction route) funnel through this one method with a branch world + persistent state in hand. Stage observation->attention->WM-update->memory-retrieval->interpretation here, producing a bounded cognition context object passed to the engine instead of the raw view; limited action search replaces/filters actions+menu before the choice call.

The fixed context assembly to replace: reversed(view.observed_events)[:10] with 220-char truncation (778-782), constraints[:8], history[-6:], situation[:400], menu[:14], plus _render_state's fixed caps (808-847). The staged pipeline's outputs (attended items, retrieved memories, interpretation) must render here; keep prompt determinism per particle for prompt_hash + ScopedActorCache CRN.

The 'one choice' terminal stage: budget/retry/fallback ladder lives here (752-772). If interpretation/attention become separate LLM calls they must share this budget accounting and abstain semantics; the final call remains the single choice.

Working-memory home: add a WM section (or sibling latent key) to the branch-local persistent state so it persists per branch, is updated at 1114-1157 on the same StateDelta, is capped like important_memories (12) and stays out of numeric views (non-phase4_policy_ prefix rule, lines 60-63); must be skipped when config.persistent=False (stateless arm).

Situation assembly pre-truncates the observation bundle into a string (8 x 220 chars / exact_content[:400]) BEFORE runtime.decide. To let the cognition pipeline own attention/interpretation, pass the structured bundle (already in payload.observation_bundle) through decision{} instead of a flattened string, or the pipeline sees lossy text.

The existing observation->attention stage (availability != noticed, one bundle per real attention event, exposure into the ledger at 377-384). A capacity-bounded attention stage extends here (currently takes ALL available items); delivery_to_attention_s stats (386-388) and attention_batches accounting must stay coherent.
Personal route re-uses runtime.decide, so an in-runtime pipeline covers it automatically; only verify the route's candidate_actions menu and unread_by_horizon semantics (206-215) are untouched.

structural_ensemble.contracts: structural_contracts.py: levels A/B/C never collapsed (3-14); qualitative SUPPORT_CLASSES only, never minted weights (36, 22-25); generation policy 3 min / 4 target / 8 soft ceiling / 12 max-capacity independent calls (63-66); structural_signature/schema_hash over causal elements only (94-143); StructuralModelCandidate own plan + lineage (146-209); StructuralModelEnsemble + validate_integrity (212-305: distinct prompts, no shared plan objects, single-survivor needs convergence certificate); sensitivity classes + thresholds spread 0.05/0.15, decision regret share 0.15 (69-85, classify_forecast_sensitivity 313-349); decompose_uncertainty between/within (352-369); AGGREGATION_METHODS equal-weight labeled / externally_weighted / single_surviving_model (87-91)
structural_ensemble.runtime: structural_runtime.py: simulate_structural_ensemble (55) is the DEFAULT path: Stage A recon (ensemble_compiler.reconnoiter_structures 114) -> omission/candidate/contrast critics (342/370/418) -> expansion (441/468) -> shared evidence gathered ONCE (union_evidence_requirements 206) -> per-candidate compile with structural directive (616/674) -> conservative dedup deterministic-then-blind-judge (527/547/599) -> per-model conditioning + REAL pilot through the canonical persistence funnel (_condition_and_pilot_model 254-311: own evidence recompile, own posterior, own event-time/Phase-11, prepare_persistence_run per model, pilot = max(8, ceil(0.20*N)) particles as deterministic prefix) -> conservative promotion (_promote_models 321, only pilot-indistinguishability spread<=0.02 with n>=12 can exclude) -> full budget per model (>= single-model N, never divided; +25% extension on material disagreement, _extend_to_full 390) -> _finalize_model per model (416-441, only one model commits the persistence checkpoint) -> _assemble_ensemble_result (443-590: equal-weight mixture 602-608, robust range 610-615, any execution error => ensemble_execution_incomplete)
structural_ensemble.how_many_models: typically 3-4 independent generation calls, adaptive to 8 (12 max-capacity); promoted set = surviving distinct plausible candidates, each with full particle budget
structural_ensemble.isolation: each candidate owns its WorldExecutionPlan/worlds/queues/actor states (integrity-checked 285-293); sharing only immutable evidence + content-addressed CachedLLM + ScopedActorCache CRN particle alignment (llm_call_cache.py)
structural_ensemble.weights: no numeric model weights by default: equal_weight_uncalibrated_structural_average (labeled), per-model distributions, robust range, minimax view; qualitative support classes from evidence-fit critics
structural_ensemble.disagreement_reporting: SimulationResult.structural_disagreement (per-model dists), uncertainty_decomposition (between/within), structural_sensitivity classification, reversal_conditions (_reversal_conditions 638), structural VOI (685), human_summary (738)
structural_ensemble.actor_interaction: each model's plan builds its OWN qualitative runtime via materialize; actor decisions inside a model use that model's world; cross-model CRN via ScopedActorCache.enter_branch(particle_index) (rollout.run_particle_range 54-76)

temporal.model: temporal_model.py: ScenarioTemporalModel per structural model (345-511, __deepcopy__ shared immutable 379-383); TimingSpec kinds exact/range/regime/calendar/after_event/unresolved -- unresolved NEVER coerced (83-154); TIMING_REGIMES wide documented bands (44-55); ActorTemporalProfile (158-185: channel_checking gaps, urgency_interrupt, sleep/active windows, relationship_priority, latent_hypotheses); ChannelTemporalModel stages transmission/delivery/moderation/exposure (194-217); DecisionTrigger REQUIRED on every decision event -- no trigger, no actor call (231-247); InstitutionalStage creates_decision_for (251-273); ContinuousProcessSpec exact-interval forms (294-321); particle_rng seeds from PARTICLE ROOT of branch_id so matched counterfactual arms share temporal reality (59-67)
temporal.compiler: temporal_compiler.py: compile_temporal_model (241) once per scenario per structural model (structural_model_id param; called from unified_runtime._condition_plan 400-413; content-addressed cache); two INDEPENDENT critics A/B over twelve failure classes with typed repairs (334-350, _apply_critic_findings 553); recurrence without a source refused
temporal.runtime: temporal_runtime.py: run_branch_temporal (892-938): loop = pop batch at earliest ts -> advance_interval over EXACT elapsed interval (415-501, adaptive logistic integration) -> process_timestamp microsteps with canonical content order, declared-read deferral, loud simultaneity conflicts (748-851) -> reproject_hazards preserving accumulated hazard+threshold (550-578) -> event-driven stance changes (582-621, material change >=0.08 or threshold crossing) -> conditional watchers + state watches (633-736); stop = quiescence | horizon | safety budget => temporally_truncated recorded (911-922)
temporal.event_queue: events.py EventQueue (119-183): schedule/pop_batch/next_event bounded by horizon_ts; queue built fresh per branch (rollout.py:70-76)
temporal.hazards: event_time.py: continuous-time first passage is production (FirstPassageOperator 765-830, ensure_first_passage_state 729-762, per-branch Exp(1) threshold, family curve intensity x sampled stance HR x consumed causal state); legacy HazardRoundOperator 386-608 (curve/calibrated/fact parameterizations); AbsorptionMonitorOperator 351-382 first-passage stamping; convert_to_event_time / convert_binary_to_event_time rewire plans (1087-1276, 1321-1493); NO working_memory/attention content in event_time.py (only 'memoryless continuation' of hazards, lines 770/835)
temporal.decision_scheduling: actor decisions are EVENT-TRIGGERED, never periodic: (1) delivery->attention->ctrl_invoke_actor with newly_noticed_information trigger (generated mode); (2) plan/synthesis-scheduled decision_opportunity events (activation_synthesis.py:411-439 synthesizes them; gates off ornament 440-450); (3) actor self-deferral => calendar-resolved revisit or conditional watcher (generated_world.py:1311-1373, register_conditional temporal_runtime.py:633); (4) institutional stages creates_decision_for; (5) stance_relevant_change events. Attention cadence is per-actor: channel-check cycle = per-particle anchor phase + sampled gap x latent-state factor (compute_notice_ts 246-300, LATENT_STATE_CHECK_FACTOR 37-38); no fixed reconsideration timers, no review grids
temporal.accounting: TemporalRunStats (47-101): delivery_to_attention_s / attention_to_decision_s quantiles, decision_triggers, attention_batches, truncations, unresolved_timing; aggregated cross-particle (941-990); attention_to_decision recorded at invocation (generated_world.py:1284-1287)

phase13.api: phase13/api.py: recommend_action / evaluate_actions / optimize_policy / value_of_information (96+); structural-ensemble DEFAULT: ensemble-shaped context => recommend_action_across_models (117-123); bare single plan raises SingleModelContextError unless allow_single_structural_model=True (31-45, 71-80); mode auto routes generated worlds through scenario_actions (never silent fixed-v1 fallback)
phase13.contracts: phase13/contracts.py: DecisionProblem.human_approval_required=True default (139) -- recommendations never auto-executed, stamped on every result (api docstring 10-12); underspecification drives Pareto+abstention (169-180); Abstention first-class with needed[] (193-204); DecisionResult (207-245): evaluated, recommended, recommendation_kind (action|policy|pareto|abstain|gather_information), pareto_frontier, counterfactual, value_of_information, causal_claim, support_grade, abstention, provenance
phase13.evaluation: MatchedEvaluator (counterfactual.py) on matched posterior particles under CRN through the full canonical rollout (all operators incl. qualitative actors fire); robust.py evaluate_bundle; utility.py evaluate_utility/pareto_frontier; abstain.py abstention_check; recommendation decision at api.py:199-218 (pareto when utility underspecified; gather_information when VOI dominates; abstain on abstention_check)
phase13.cross_model: phase13/ensemble.py recommend_action_across_models (69+): per-model full re-entry (each generated model routes through scenario_actions INSIDE its model), winner-per-model, worst-model downside, minimax regret across models, stable_winner else robust set with abstention; winner-change/regret-share thresholds mirror structural_contracts (27-28)
phase13.generated_action_layer: scenario_actions/: api.py _run_generated (151) discover_best_action (290) evaluate_proposed_actions (305); language.py scenario action language; candidates.py ConcreteAction/PlanStep with exact_content (46-52); compiler.py candidates->kernel ops; execution.py ScenarioPlanOperator injects plan steps into rollouts (content into semantic events, 74); generated_search.py ScenarioActionSearch (82-370): typed structural gates only (screen 96-133), staged screen/full evaluation with diversity protection, diagnosis-driven blind revision (165-260, REVISION_OPS 48-52), blind adjudication (262-309), honest stopping; planner.py multi-step plans + PR#115 message realization (256-278); forensics.py, report.py
phase13.uncertainty_axes_integration: new axes plug into: DecisionResult.provenance.structural_ensemble block + robust.py bundle stats + decompose_uncertainty(between/within) + classify thresholds (ensemble.py:27-28) + per-arm goal evals (goals.evaluate_goal_on_arm carries per_particle rows). Behavioral/cognition uncertainty is level C inside each model -- a staged-cognition axis would surface as within-model variance and via actor_policy_report provenance

messaging_pr115.seam: phase13/scenario_actions/message_bridge.py:18-41 make_message_realizer -> ReplyFirstPlanner; injected into planner (planner.py:76-82); _realize_messages (planner.py:256-278): only consequential person-to-person message steps with draft exact_content <=400 chars get realized; realized text (<=2000 chars) replaces step.exact_content with provenance {system: reply_first(PR#115), label, gates}; fails CLOSED to the general draft
messaging_pr115.reply_first: swm/decision/reply_first.py ReplyFirstPlanner (109-540): desired replies -> backward requirements -> beat structures (BEATS 55, STRUCTURES 73) -> beat search variants -> capped wording pass -> THREE separated judges: TRUTH (fabrication/numeric guard, hard gate, 222), LANGUAGE (human-register judge swm/decision/language_judge.py, hard gate), OUTCOME (blind persona ensemble ranking gate-survivors only, 251) -> ONE output with honesty label; every call traced
messaging_pr115.recipient_processing_today: realized exact_content flows: candidate step -> compiled kernel op emit_semantic_event exact_content[:1200] (generated_world.py:359) -> mechanism delivery (causal_boundary; unverified attempts reach nobody 823-824) -> route_semantic_event per-recipient channel timing (803-870) -> availability buffer -> attention bundle -> ctrl_invoke_actor -> recipient's PERSISTENT QUALITATIVE LLM reads it inside situation (bundle line content[:220] or single exact_content[:400], generated_world.py:1261-1268) and/or observations (content[:220], qualitative_actor.py:779-781) and decides; their reply is their own attempt through the same boundary
messaging_pr115.off_runtime_recipient_models: swm/decision/persona_response.py (qualitative recipient simulation, competing inbox hypotheses -- the outcome judge), message_optimizer.py + strategy_scorer.py (VariableMap-space search), situational_levers.py, llm_moves.llm_message_encoder, message_pipeline.py optimize_cold_outreach; docs ARCHITECTURE_MESSAGE_OPTIMIZER.md; tests tests/test_general_message_model.py, test_reply_first.py, test_message_optimizer.py
messaging_pr115.truncation_note: the recipient's decision LLM today sees AT MOST 400 chars (situation) / 220 chars (observation line) of the realized message even though up to 2000 chars are realized and 1200 stored on the event -- context assembly, not delivery, is the bottleneck

personal_reaction.simulation: individual_reaction.py simulate_individual_reaction (140-295): _mini_world per sample (112-137: person+counterpart entities, history exposed at real ts or order-preserving with unresolved spacing); _person_temporal_model from user context ONLY (62-109); stimulus TRAVELS: channel_delivery_ts -> compute_notice_ts (198-205); notice > horizon => unread_by_horizon sample, NO LLM roleplay (206-215); else expose stimulus, situation 'You just noticed (around HH:MM)...' (216-230), runtime.decide + execute (231-233); samples record hypothesis_id/temporal_state/interpretation/observable_response; aggregate_actor_decisions + explicit unread mass in distribution (257-268); outcomes responded / read_but_deferred / unread_by_horizon
personal_reaction.tiering: target person automatically Tier 1 (reaction_is_the_question; tiers passed directly 176-179)

persistence.identity: phase8_identity.py: stable world/scenario/actor/dyad ids, alias + uncertain-linkage handling preserving multiple identity hypotheses
persistence.contracts: phase8_persistence.py: typed persistent-variable registry -- every variable declares meaning, updating events, observation model, transition family, posterior representation, materializes_into (ornamental variables refused); persistent_features_for_policy / PolicyFeedbackEvent Phase-4 boundary
persistence.storage: phase8_storage.py: JsonlBackend (portable) + SqliteBackend WAL production (atomic idempotent event append, atomic checkpoint commit, crash recovery); phase8_events durable log; phase8_filtering sequential filters; phase8_service checkpoints/lineage
persistence.run_funnel: phase8_pipeline.py: prepare_persistence_run (129-215: build world, bind scenario schema, ingest actor_history ONCE as PersistentEvents, load prior checkpoint watermark, replay filters -> posteriors (observed_time <= as_of leakage-safe), materialize into world fields, _expose_actor_memory 356-378 (episodic store retrieve k=8, recency/salience-weighted, NEVER perfect recall -> entity.memory -> ActorView.remembered_events)); run_persistence_slice (218-224: index-keyed deterministic particle slices -- pilot prefix reuse); finalize_persistence_run (226-287: project all branches, attach actor decision distributions + policy/consequence reports, SINGLE checkpoint commit advancing lineage, support-grade effect of load-bearing experimental families)
persistence.actor_state_scope: QualitativeActorState is per-run/per-branch only (latent_state); cross-session continuity today = phase8 typed variables (engagement_propensity default family) + event log + episodic memory exposure; ensemble runs commit the checkpoint for only ONE model (structural_runtime._finalize_model commit_checkpoint flag 416-424); unified_runtime passes prior_checkpoint.actor_history at 669

risks: CRN/cache determinism: prompt bytes are the ScopedActorCache key (llm_call_cache.py:157-203) and prompt_hash is provenance; any nondeterministic or cross-particle-shared stage in observation->attention->retrieval breaks cross-model CRN alignment and replay stability. Staged outputs must be pure functions of (branch world, particle stream).

Message truncation: recipient decision context caps exact_content at 400/220 chars (generated_world.py:1261-1268, qualitative_actor.py:779-781) while PR#115 realizes up to 2000 chars -- the cognition pipeline's working memory must carry the full message or message optimization is evaluated against text the recipient never 'read'.

Budget multiplication: extra per-decision LLM stages count against SWM_ACTOR_LLM_BUDGET=240 shared across ALL branches/actors (engine._calls_used) and max_invocations_per_actor=40; mid-pipeline exhaustion must produce the existing temporal-truncation semantics (never an invented decision), and the revision round re-enters the pipeline for the same event.

No-numeric-cognition invariant: interpretation/attention stages must emit qualitative text/categorical output only (parse drops numerics, tests enforce); numeric salience scoring must live in the mechanism layer (like temporal attention) or in fitted layers (actor_cognition.py pattern), never inside the simulated mind.

Branch isolation + stateless arm: working memory must live on the branch world under a non-phase4_policy_ latent key (so it never leaks into numeric/persona views, qualitative_actor.py:60-63), never on shared objects (temporal model is shared immutable); persistence must be gated on config.persistent (stateless_llm_policy contract 879-880, 1126-1128).

Double-attention conflict: availability!=noticed already exists at the temporal layer (schedule_attention/collect_attention_bundle; exposure recorded at notice; delivery_to_attention stats). A cognition-level attention stage must select WITHIN the noticed bundle, not re-decide noticing, or §9/§20 accounting and unread_by_horizon semantics break.

Aggregation/provenance contract: aggregate_actor_decisions, calibration, tier routing reports and dozens of tests key on posterior.provenance.qualitative fields (decision_source, hypothesis_id, state_hash, prompt_hash, act_or_wait, revisit) and on excluded_from_qualitative_aggregation for fallbacks -- the pipeline must extend, not reshape, this block.

Three invocation seams: inserting anywhere other than QualitativeActorPolicyRuntime.decide/engine (e.g. only in the generated operator) would leave fixed-v1 decision_opportunity events, the individual-reaction route and Phase-13 matched evaluations running the old path; Phase-13 CRN matched arms additionally require the pipeline to be identical across arms except where an action causally changes inputs.

Deferral/revisit semantics: act_or_wait + revisit{when,condition} compile to real triggers (compile_actor_deferral); if the pipeline's action-search stage renames or restructures wait-like choices, deferral compilation and actors_declined_to_act accounting silently die.

Cross-session gap: qualitative private state does not persist across sessions (phase8 persists only typed variables + episodic memory); if the new pipeline's memory stages assume durable actor memory, that is a phase8 registry extension (materializes_into + consumer required), not a qualitative_actor-only change.
